notes: Runs out of the box without any tweaks required but framerate is rather low, around 15 fps in some screens. However as this is turn based game it didn't really impact my experience all that much.
title: Interstellar Space: Genesis

notes: Despite a long load at launch (black screen for ~45 seconds), the game runs perfectly. Maximum graphics settings, no slow downs or crashes.
title: Interstellar Space: Genesis

notes: The long load time is gone (may have been first launch). The new 1.0.4 patch continues to work well. No issues at all.
title: Interstellar Space: Genesis

notes: Runs perfectly in and of itself, but if you alt+tab out of the application and back the screen becomes a very tiny box in the top right, I haven't been able to resolve this yet.
title: Interstellar Space: Genesis
